issue_summary: Kaseya reports Datto RMM agent installs are failing due to certificate errors; the incident remains under investigation.
impact: New Datto RMM agent deployments and reinstall attempts may fail, delaying onboarding, break/fix recovery, and rollout work for MSP teams.
status: Investigating as of 2026-04-02 21:09 UTC; no resolution posted yet.
response_1: Pause non-urgent Datto RMM agent rollout or reinstall work and flag onboarding/change windows that depend on fresh agent deployment.
response_2: Check existing managed endpoints for coverage gaps, route urgent installs through alternate tooling/manual handling, and monitor Kaseya status for the fix window.
